name: Groaty Dick Pudding
recipeIngredient: Oat groats -- if you can't get oat groats, try pet store or health food store
recipeInstructions:
1. Put meat (do not brown first), onions, leeks, salt and pepper, and oat groats in an earthenware pot.
2. Pour stock over top and stir.
3. Place lid on the pot.
4. Put in medium-low oven for 16 hours. The groats will absorb stocks and juices and expand.
